title: vikipidiya
paragraphs: shri dalada maligava  yanu budurajanan vahansege  vam danthadhathun vahanse varthamanaye thanpath kara athi maligavayi. varthamana dalada maligava shri lankave mahanuvara nagaraye pihita atha. udarata rajyaya samaye (1592 sita 1815) meya pihita thibune evakata pavathi rajakiya maliga sankirnaya thulaya. shri dalada maligava mulvarata godanaganu labuye palamuvana vimaladharmasuriya(1592-1604) rajathuma visini. ethuma idikala maligava pruthugisi aakramanikayo vinasha kalaha.  danata daknata labena parani demahal vadasitina maligava idikaranu laba aththe shri viraparakrama narendrasianha(1707 - 1739) rajathumaya. inpasu raja pamini nayakkar vanshika dravida rajavaru pava shri dalada maligava vadi diyunu kota aaraksha kalaha.

dalada maligava pihita athi mahanuvara nagarayama yuneskova visin loka urumayak lesa nam kara atha. siyam nikaye malvathu ho asgiri yana deparshavaye svamin vahansela dinapathama dalada vahanseta puja sathkara karathi. mema pujava (thevava) dinakata thun varak (pandara, daval saha savasa) pavathvayi badada dinavala vishesha pujavak lesa nanumura mangalyaya pavathvayi. (thava duratath...)
thoragath lipi: pasugiya sathiya – milanga sathiya
thoragath seyaru: pasugiya sathiya – vathman sathiya – milanga sathiya
sianhala basin pavathina vyapruthivala sianhala mul pituva vethada anekuth vyapruthivala iංgrisi mul pituva vethada sabandi pahatha dakve.
mema vikipidiyava liya aththe  sianhaleni. 2005 (2005) vasaredi arambaunu ehi, danata  lipi 20,866 atha.  venath boho vikipidiya pavathiyi; samaharak pahatha layisthu gatha kara atha.
